description: 胡导风格的城市夜雨场景，忧郁孤独的氛围

visual_elements.lighting: 霓虹灯反射在湿漉漉的地面上，蓝绿色调
visual_elements.composition: 不对称构图，人物在画面一侧
visual_elements.camera: 广角镜头，轻微手持晃动

prompt_templates.midjourney: cinematic film still of a lonely person walking on rainy city street at night, neon lights reflecting on wet pavement, blue-green color palette, asymmetrical composition, moody lighting, dramatic shadows, masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, photorealistic, shot on 35mm film --ar 9:16 --style raw --stylize 100
prompt_templates.seedream: 电影感画面，雨夜城市街道，孤独的行人，霓虹灯在湿漉漉的地面上反射出蓝绿色光芒，不对称构图，忧郁氛围，光影对比强烈，最高质量，超精细，文艺片风格
prompt_templates.seedance: @scene: rainy city street at night @character: lonely person walking slowly @lighting: neon lights reflecting on wet pavement, blue-green tones @camera: wide angle, slow push in, slight handheld shake @mood: lonely, melancholic, contemplative @style: art film, slow cinema

usage_notes: 适用于表现城市孤独、回忆、内心独白等场景。可以调整人物性别、服装、具体动作来适应不同剧情。

variations.name: 车内视角
variations.prompt_addition: from inside a car, raindrops on window, out of focus background

variations.name: 地铁站
variations.prompt_addition: subway station, fluorescent lighting, empty platform

variations.name: 天台
variations.prompt_addition: rooftop, overlooking city skyline, rain falling into darkness
